top_findings.title: No dependency manifest (requirements.txt / pyproject.toml)
top_findings.evidence: server.py:6 imports `from mcp.server.fastmcp import FastMCP` and data_loader.py:4 imports pandas, but no requirements.txt/pyproject.toml/setup.py exists in the run. A fresh checkout cannot install or run the server; the archive's scores.json is all-zeros precisely because `mcp` was unavailable in a clean env.
top_findings.suggestion: Add a requirements.txt pinning at least `mcp` and `pandas` so the server is reproducibly installable.
